Hi there!

I'm Jyoti Dhiman,

a UI/UX Designer creating meaningful, user-focused digital products.

Passionate about solving real problems through research, interaction design, and thoughtful user experiences.

MORE ABOUT ME

A UI/UX Designer passionate about crafting digital experiences that are simple, meaningful, and human-centered. With 1+ year of experience, I design products that turn complexity into clarity through thoughtful research, intuitive interactions, and visually engaging interfaces. Holding a BCA degree (CGPA 8.2) from Kurukshetra University and currently pursuing an MCA, I combine technical understanding with creative problem-solving to build experiences users love.

From wireframes to high-fidelity prototypes, I focus on designing products that are not only beautiful but also functional, accessible, and impactful. My goal is to create digital experiences that feel effortless while solving real-world problems.

Designing with purpose. Building with empathy. Learning without limits.

RESUMELINKEDIN

Selected work

Here is a sample of user-centric design initiatives I've worked on.

CASE STUDY

PlantArk: Designing Australia's Online Plant Marketplace

A modern marketplace experience that enables users to discover, buy, and sell plants across Australia. Designed in Figma with a focus on intuitive navigation, seamless product discovery, seller trust, and a user-friendly purchasing journey.

VIEW CASE STUDY

CASE STUDY

KametiLedger: Designing a Digital Kameti Management Platform

A fintech web application that helps community savings groups manage contributions, enrollments, payouts, and financial records digitally. Designed in Figma with a focus on transparency, security, automation, and effortless financial management for both organizers and members.

VIEW CASE STUDY

CASE STUDY

CRM HRMS: Designing a Smarter Employee Management Experience

A modern HRMS web application built to manage employees, attendance, payroll, recruitment, and organizational workflows in one centralized platform. Designed in Figma with a focus on clarity, productivity, and streamlined HR operations.

VIEW CASE STUDY

CASE STUDY

DCT Technology: Designing a Modern Digital Presence

A corporate website designed to showcase software development, web solutions, UI/UX design, and IT consulting services. Created in Figma with a focus on clarity, credibility, conversion, and an exceptional user experience for businesses seeking technology solutions.

VIEW CASE STUDY

CASE STUDY

Family1st: Designing a GPS Tracking Platform for Everyday Safety

A mobile and web application designed to track family members, vehicles, and assets in real-time. Designed in Figma with a focus on trust, clear mapping interfaces, quick alerts, and simplified device setup.

VIEW CASE STUDY

UX Process

Focusing on figuring out the right problem to solve is the core of my UX process. I lead with a user-centric mindset, using iterative sprints to design and deliver systems that meet both user needs and business goals. With a knack for innovating within constraints like latency, token budgets or infrastructure, I adapt UX flows to the realities of AI systems while maintaining usability, trust and measurable impact.

Skillset

I always strive to bring together the proper techniques and methods to achieve the best possible outcome by working collaboratively. Here is the spread of my core skills:

UX DESIGN

User Research & Insights

Information Architecture

User Journey Mapping

Usability Testing

UX Strategy & Optimization

UI DESIGN

Design Systems

Responsive Interface Design

Dashboard & Web App Design

Interactive Prototyping

Visual Design & Accessibility

PRODUCT + AI

AI-assisted Design Workflows

Human-centered AI Experiences

Prompt-driven UX

AI Product Thinking

Data-informed Design Decisions

Toolbox

These are the preferred tools that I've been working on to streamline my creative process. I'm always open to learning new methodologies, approaches and strategies to hone my craft.
